votes.rationale: WS-D implementation complete: portal/scripts/generate-bootstrap.mjs implemented as an ES module with full argument parsing, demand/topology fallback derivation, idempotency via existsSync, --dry-run/--force/--yes flags. package.json bootstrap:gen command added. OffBook.ai dry-run produces 12 artifacts with correct classifications.

Idempotency implemented correctly. Manual-only boundary enforced for proposal.md. OPERATOR agent scoped to governance-resident repo only. Dry-run proof sufficient for the implementation motion; real-write proof correctly delegated to motion-0090.
Generator implementation matches spec. Proof sequence is sound: dry-run (motion-0089) then real-write (motion-0090). No runtime artifacts touched.
